items.claim: Asuelu has never been knocked out in his career.
items.quote: Asuelu's never been knocked out till this day.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is chinny and prone to being finished.
items.quote: He's chinny, but he's a finish or be finished fighter.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has improved his boxing drastically since his loss to Rob Font.
items.quote: he's improved drastically since that loss. Great boxing.

items.claim: Gable Steveson has a 100% finish rate with all three wins coming by first-round KO.
items.quote: Has a 100% finish rate, all three wins by KO in the first round.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has a 11-month layoff heading into this fight.
Nikita Krylov is vulnerable to straight shots down the center and being countered.
items.quote: we've seen him get hit with straight shots down the center, and he's been open to getting countered.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has a 100% finish rate and has never won a fight by decision.
items.quote: 100% finish rate. He's never won a fight by decision.

items.claim: Bobby Green's cardio advantage increases the longer the fight lasts.
items.quote: the longer this fight goes, it should favor Green all day.

items.claim: Brandon Royval struggles against opponents with decent power.
items.quote: he has struggled with guys with decent power.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is susceptible to being taken down and controlled.
items.quote: He is open to getting taken down though and controlled

items.claim: Mario Bautista has improved his submission defense since his first fight against Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: Bautista knows how to defend sub attempts now.
